# TUC AI Lab (ai-tools.techbridge.edu.gh)

> A catalogue of AI-powered tools built by Techbridge University College (TUC), Accra, Ghana.

## Public tools
- AI Lab catalogue: https://ai-tools.techbridge.edu.gh/ai-lab/
- Poster Studio (branded promotional posters): https://ai-tools.techbridge.edu.gh/poster/
- UMaT Curriculum Recommendations Tracker: https://ai-tools.techbridge.edu.gh/umat/
- Typing & Mathematics Island (gamified learning for children): https://ai-tools.techbridge.edu.gh/math-island/
- TUC Banner generator: https://ai-tools.techbridge.edu.gh/techbridge-university-college-banner/

Publisher: Techbridge University College (TUC), Oyibi, Greater Accra, Ghana.
